title: techmap: Support mapping to dynamic cell types

features.name: dynamic cell type mapping with sformatf in techmap_chtype
features.description: Code should include a techmap module with dynamic cell type mapping using $sformatf in the techmap_chtype attribute to generate target cell type names at synthesis time

features.name: techmap_celltype attribute for source cell matching
features.description: Code should include a techmap module with techmap_celltype attribute to specify which cell type to match for mapping

features.name: techmap placeholder and replace directives with parameterized module
features.description: Code should include techmap _TECHMAP_PLACEHOLDER_ and _TECHMAP_REPLACE_ directives with parameter forwarding for width-parameterized cell replacement
